designer.title: Design your app's user interface with our intuitive drag-and-drop designer.
designer.desc: Simply drag components from the palette and arrange them on your screen. Real-time visual preview and Material Design components built-in.

blocks.title: Program your app's logic using visual blocks instead of traditional code.
blocks.desc: Connect blocks together to create powerful functionality without learning complex programming syntax. Beginner-friendly and error-proof.

management.title: Manage all your projects from a centralized dashboard.
management.desc: Create new projects, organize existing ones, and access all your apps in one convenient location with cloud-based storage.

export.title: Generate your finished Android app with a single click.
export.desc: Download the APK file directly or share it instantly using QR codes for easy distribution and testing.

features.title: Why Choose Rena?
features.sub: Everything you need to build amazing apps without coding.

f1.title: No Coding!
f1.desc: Create apps without writing a single line of code.

f2.title: Cloud Based
f2.desc: Safe storage on powerful cloud infrastructure.

f3.title: Simple Blocks
f3.desc: Drag & drop blocks to build your app logic easily.

f4.title: Live Testing
f4.desc: Test changes instantly on your device.

cta.title: Ready to bring your ideas to life?
cta.sub: Join thousands of creators building amazing apps with Rena Platform.

footer.desc: The visual development platform of the future. Create, Build, and Launch apps without writing code.
footer.copy: Rena Platform. Built with passion for creators.
